name: ofichaos
description: Party game web de deducción social ambientado en una oficina caótica

scripts.test: node --test tests/e2e.test.js && node --test tests/victory_verification.test.js && node --test tests/client-lifecycle.test.mjs tests/onboarding.test.mjs tests/theme-contract.test.mjs tests/world-layout.test.mjs
scripts.check: node --check server/*.js && node --check client/src/main.js && node --check client/src/scenes/*.js && node --check client/src/systems/*.js
